text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint town called Everhart, there was a peculiar old bookworm named Owlley. He lived up high in an ancient oak near the library. Owlley loved nothing more than reading. Every evening he perched on those sturdy branches and fluttered down to browse through the classics.

One rainy afternoon, Owlley found a dusty old volume entitled "The Chronicles of Amber." He read slowly, fascinated by how centuries blurred within those porous tales.

Sometime later, Owlley heard unusual murmurs. Odd creatures seemed to slip through his chimney whenever he slept. One night, he noticed three strange cats creeping around his desk. They blinked with ruby eyes and spoke in soft tones.

"Why mooch my books?"

They spoke softly.

"I just want to listen!"

Later, Owlley dreamt of strange forests. There, owl guardians waited for him. They knew why things happened.

"Why hurt them?"

They blinked slower.

"We restore."

With their wisdom, Owlley decided
